title: Raja Ravi Varma
description: Source: TOI Subject: Art and Culture Context: Raja Ravi Varma’s painting ‘Yashoda and Krishna’ has become the most expensive work of modern Indian art ever sold at auction, fetching a record-shattering ₹167.2 crore. About Raja Ravi Varma: Who He Was?
